chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, KARACHI Criminal Revision Application No.145 of 2020 __________________________________________________________________ Date Order with signature of Judge For further orders. 09.08.2021 Ms. Saadia Khatoon, Advocate for the Applicant. Ms. Rahat Ehsan, Addl. Prosecutor General, Sindh. None present for the Complainant. -x-x-x-x-x- Per report furnished by the trial Court, entire case of the prosecution has been concluded and it is at the verge of recording statement of the accused in terms of Section 342 Cr.P.C; however, application filed by the accused was dismissed on merits on 25.08.2020. Against said order, instant application has been preferred. The main grievance of the applicant is that she has not been given chance to put PWs under cross-examination. In support of her contention, she has annexed copies of depositions which reveal that many of the witnesses were subjected to cross-examination; however, some of them were not subjected. Under these circumstances, it will be appropriate to proceed with the trial instead of hanging it without any progress. Learned Addl. P.G, Sindh has no objection. Accordingly, the impugned order dated 25.08.2020 is hereby set-aside. The trial Court is hereby directed to call/resummons all those witnesses who were not subject to cross and after securing their attendance defense may be given full opportunity of defense and then conclude the trial within shortest possible time preferably within four weeks. Let copy of this order be communicated to the trial Court through MIT-II, for compliance. Instant application, in view of above, is hereby disposed of along with all pending applications.

Let copy of this order be communicated to the trial Court through MIT-II, for compliance. Instant application, in view of above, is hereby disposed of along with all pending applications. The interim order dated 10.09.2020 is also hereby recalled. JUDGE Zulfiqar/P.A
